allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=sys.stdin.read\(\); m=re.search\(r'\\"message\\":\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"',d\); print\(m.group\(1\) if m else d[:500]\)")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=1768 get Name,ProcessId,CommandLine /format:list 2>nul")
Bash(node -e "const f=require\('/tmp/fields.json'\); console.log\('fields count:', f.length, '| first:', f[0]?.name\)")
Bash(node -e "const { TOTP } = require\('otplib'\); const t = new TOTP\(\); const s = 'JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP'; console.log\(t.generate\(s\), t.verify\({ token: t.generate\(s\), secret: s }\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { TOTP, generateSecret } from 'otplib'; const t = new TOTP\(\); const s = generateSecret\(\); console.log\('secret:', s\); const tok = t.generate\(s\); console.log\('verify:', t.verify\({token: tok, secret: s}\)\);")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Atlast\\ai-saas-starter-kit-nextjs-main"; Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "next","dev","--port","3000" -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\).Path -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "Server not ready yet" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "not ready" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Atlast\\ai-saas-starter-kit-nextjs-main"; $env:NODE_ENV = "development"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit","-Command","cd 'c:\\Users\\Atlast\\ai-saas-starter-kit-nextjs-main'; npx next dev --port 3000" -WindowStyle Normal; echo "Dev server window opened")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } } else { "No process on port 3000" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "Dev server running on port 3000 \(PID $\($conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\)\)" } else { "No dev server on port 3000" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "Stopped" } else { "Not running" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","npm run dev" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\Atlast\\ai-saas-starter-kit-nextjs-main" -WindowStyle Hidden; "restarted")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; "stopped")
